P01.name: Explicit & Transmission Learning
P01.success_criterion: Students understand because instruction is clear and structured.
questions: The instructor explained concepts in a clear and understandable manner.
The step-by-step explanations helped me learn effectively.
Worked examples improved my understanding of difficult topics.
The course content was presented in a logical sequence.
Instructor demonstrations helped me apply concepts correctly.
I rarely felt confused about what was expected of me.
The amount of guidance provided was appropriate.
Direct explanations helped me learn more efficiently than self-exploration.
Feedback helped me correct misunderstandings quickly.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.

P02.name: Discovery-Based Learning
questions: I had sufficient opportunities to explore concepts independently.
Discovering solutions myself improved my understanding.
Exploration activities increased my curiosity about the subject.
I was encouraged to investigate multiple possible solutions.
The learning activities helped me identify patterns and relationships.
I felt comfortable experimenting with different approaches.
Independent exploration improved my confidence in the subject.
I was able to derive meaningful conclusions from my investigations.
The level of instructor guidance supported exploration without limiting it.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.

P03.name: Active Engagement Learning
P03.success_criterion: Students actively participate instead of passively receiving information.
questions: I actively participated during class activities.
Interactive activities improved my understanding of the content.
The course encouraged me to think critically during class.
Learning activities kept me engaged throughout the session.
I regularly applied concepts rather than only listening to explanations.
Class participation helped reinforce key concepts.
The activities encouraged me to contribute my ideas.
Active participation improved my retention of the material.
The balance between instruction and activities was appropriate.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.

P04.name: Social Constructivist Learning
P04.success_criterion: Learning occurs through social interaction and discussion.
questions: Discussions with classmates improved my understanding.
Group activities helped me learn concepts more effectively.
I benefited from hearing different perspectives.
Collaborative learning encouraged deeper thinking.
My peers contributed positively to my learning experience.
I felt comfortable sharing ideas during discussions.
Working with others improved my problem-solving abilities.
Peer interactions clarified concepts I initially struggled with.
Group activities were meaningful and productive.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.

P05.name: Mastery / Competency-Based Learning
questions: The learning objectives were clearly defined.
I understood the performance standards expected of me.
Assessments accurately measured my understanding.
Feedback clearly identified areas for improvement.
I had opportunities to improve after making mistakes.
Progression through the course felt based on understanding rather than completion.
I was confident in my understanding before moving to new topics.
The competency expectations motivated me to improve.
The course helped me identify specific skill gaps.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.

P06.name: Problem & Project Based Learning
P06.success_criterion: Students learn through solving authentic problems.
questions: Real-world problems increased my interest in the subject.
Project work helped me connect theory to practice.
The problems were relevant to real-world situations.
Solving complex problems improved my understanding.
The project required meaningful application of concepts.
I developed problem-solving skills through project activities.
The project encouraged independent research and learning.
The project outcomes felt meaningful and useful.
The workload associated with projects was appropriate.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.

P07.name: Inquiry-Based Learning
P07.success_criterion: Students investigate questions and evidence systematically.
questions: The course encouraged me to ask meaningful questions.
Investigating evidence improved my understanding.
I was encouraged to form and test hypotheses.
Inquiry activities improved my analytical thinking.
Data collection and analysis contributed to my learning.
I felt ownership of the investigation process.
The inquiry tasks stimulated my curiosity.
I developed stronger critical-thinking skills through inquiry activities.
The instructor provided appropriate support during investigations.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.

P08.name: Flipped Classroom
P08.success_criterion: Pre-class learning enables effective in-class application.
questions: Pre-class materials prepared me for classroom activities.
The assigned videos/readings were useful and relevant.
I regularly reviewed the pre-class materials before class.
In-class activities reinforced concepts learned beforehand.
Class time was used effectively for application and discussion.
The flipped format encouraged me to take responsibility for learning.
I arrived better prepared for class because of the pre-class content.
The balance between pre-class and in-class work was appropriate.
The flipped structure improved my learning experience.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.

P09.name: Reflective & Metacognitive Learning
P09.success_criterion: Students monitor and improve their own learning.
questions: Reflection activities helped me understand how I learn.
I became more aware of my strengths and weaknesses.
Reflection helped identify gaps in my understanding.
I regularly evaluated my learning progress.
Self-assessment improved my learning decisions.
Reflection encouraged deeper thinking about the subject.
I adjusted my learning strategies based on reflection.
Reflection activities improved my confidence as a learner.
Reflective exercises contributed positively to my performance.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.

P10.name: Technology-Integrated Learning
questions: The technology tools improved my understanding of course concepts.
Digital resources made learning more accessible.
Interactive tools helped me visualize complex concepts.
Technology increased my engagement with the course.
The technology used was relevant to the learning objectives.
Digital feedback tools helped improve my performance.
Technology made learning more efficient.
The tools were easy to use and supported learning effectively.
Technology enhanced my ability to solve problems and complete tasks.
This teaching approach helped me achieve the learning objectives.
